name: lsp-python
description: Python language intelligence — type checking, diagnostics, definitions, references
prerequisites: Node.js 18+, basedpyright installed (npm i -g basedpyright), Python project
setup: Run 'npx cclsp@latest setup' for interactive configuration, or create a cclsp.json in your project root (see cclsp_config below)

cclsp_config._comment: Place this as cclsp.json in your project root to configure the Python LSP server
